items.title: Mourinho: I apologized to Arbeloa over celebration...
items.summary: José Mourinho said he apologised to Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa for his celebrations in Benfica's 4-2 Champions League win on Wednesday

items.title: 'Bliksemvertrek Benzema in de maak na beledigend contractvoorstel Al-Ittihad'
items.summary: Karim Benzema en Al-Ittihad liggen op ramkoers. Volgens alle toonaangevende Franse media weigert de 38-jarige spits voorlopig niet alleen om nog in actie te komen voor de club uit Saoedi-Arabië, maar wil hij vertrekken. Dat alles vanwege een contractvoorstel dat door Benzema en zijn entourage als beledigend wordt beschouwd.

items.title: Champions League talking points: Mourinho's master...
items.summary: With all 36 Champions League teams in action simultaneously, Matchday 8 of the league phase delivered plenty of drama to cap a fun competition so far. ESPN FC's writers pick out their highs and lows of the tournament to this point.

items.title: Op deze vijf fronten kwam Ajax tekort in de Champions League
items.summary: Ajax heeft woensdagavond een teleurstellende Champions League-campagne in stijl afgesloten. De nederlaag tegen Olympiakos legde nog maar eens de tekortkomingen van de Amsterdammers bloot. ‘Wij kunnen ons op dit moment ook niet meten met de subtop van Europa.’

items.title: Napoli: Sterling 'financial demands' block move
items.summary: Napoli sporting director Giovanni Manna has said Raheem Sterling's "significant financial demands" could be an obstacle in doing a deal for the forward.

items.title: Pep: City panicked over Mourinho's UCL strategy
items.summary: Pep Guardiola revealed Manchester City were panicking over their Champions League hopes as Benfica pushed for a late goal against Real Madrid.

items.title: Madrid, PSG drop to UCL playoffs in chaotic finale...
items.summary: Real Madrid were stunningly dumped into the qualifying playoffs of the Champions League by former coach Jose Mourinho on Wednesday and will be joined there by Paris Saint-Germain.

items.title: Slot reageert op kritiek Gerrard: 'Jullie luisteren niet goed genoeg'
items.summary: Arne Slot heeft na het gewonnen Champions League-duel met Qarabag gereageerd op kritiek van Steven Gerrard. De Liverpool-legende hekelde een uitspraak van de Nederlandse manager dat zijn ploeg vorig seizoen geholpen werd door de vroege uitschakeling in Europa.

items.title: Dit kan Feyenoord verwachten van Real Betis
items.summary: Om de laatste kans op de Europa League-tussenronde te grijpen moet Feyenoord donderdagavond winnen bij Real Betis. Tactische analyse van de Spaanse ploeg die met veel blessures kampt, maar nog altijd herkenbaar voetbal speelt onder Manuel Pellegrini.

items.title: Palace agree £50m deal in principle for Strand Larsen
items.summary: Crystal Palace agree a deal in principle worth in the region of £50m to sign Wolves striker Jorgen Strand Larsen.

items.title: Australian Open: Friday's Order of Play as Alcaraz, Djokovic, Sinner contest semis
items.summary: Order of Play for Day 13 at the Australian Open as the men's singles semi-finals take place.

items.title: PSV houdt poot stijf: 'Veel geld voor een blessuregevoelige speler'
items.summary: In Rondje Europa legt clubwatcher Tim Reedijk uit waarom PSV de poot stijf houdt wat betreft Ricardo Pepi, die voor een monsterbedrag de overstap kan maken naar Fulham.

items.title: Aston Villa latest: 'Palace agree deal to sign Guessand on loan'
Another Alcaraz vs Sinner repeat or can Djokovic, Zverev spoil the party?
items.summary: Are we heading for another Carlos Alcaraz vs Jannik Sinner Grand Slam final or can Novak Djokovic and Alexander Zverev become the disrupters and spoil the party?

items.title: Reed returns to DP World Tour action after quitting LIV Golf
items.summary: Patrick Reed has taken his first step toward a PGA Tour comeback, returning to DP World Tour action just a day after announcing his departure from LIV Golf.

items.title: Crystal Palace agree £50m deal to buy Jørgen Strand Larsen from Wolves
items.summary: Leeds had £40m bid for striker rejected this month James Ward-Prowse seals loan move to Burnley Wolves have agreed to sell Jørgen Strand Larsen to Crystal Palace after receiving a bid totalling £50m for the Norway striker. The agent Jorge Mendes has been leading negotiations on behalf of Wolves, who have accepted an initial £45m, plus £5m in add-ons. Strand Larsen would represent Palace’s record buy, eclipsing the £35m they paid to take Brennan Johnson from Tottenham this month. Continue reading...

items.title: Sabalenka through to fourth consecutive Australian Open final against Rybakina
items.summary: Aryna Sabalenka reached her fourth consecutive Australian Open final where she will play Elena Rybakina in a battle of the big-hitters.

items.title: Why Steve Holland could be key to Man Utd's revival under Carrick
items.summary: Why former England and Chelsea coach Steve Holland could be the key appointment in new boss Michael Carrick's coaching team at Manchester United.

items.title: Football as a content machine: 18 Champions League games was fun but overstuffed | Max Rushden
items.summary: The joy of the game is that big moments are rare – the climax of the UCL group phase felt like too much of a good thing It’s half an hour after attempting to watch 18 football matches at the same time on the final match day of the Champions League group stage, so it’s still a little early to tell whether I think it was a brilliant night of football or not. The information overload from a TV, laptop and phone means I may need a couple of weeks to really process it – by which time of course this will all be forgotten and we’ll be wondering whether one point from three Premier League games is enough for Thomas Frank to keep his job. Continue reading...

items.title: Do Villa have the legs to end their 30-year trophy drought?
items.summary: An injury crisis and a returning hero. Aston Villa's season continues to take sharp turns.
